macro_watch.name: middle-east-risk
queries: Israel Lebanon Iran strike attack ceasefire oil markets when:7d
Middle East oil inflation markets Reuters AP when:7d
macro_watch.summary_cn: 这类地缘事件会先影响油价、通胀预期和风险偏好，再传导到半导体和成长股估值。
macro_watch.summary_en: These geopolitical shocks usually move oil, inflation expectations, and risk appetite first, then flow into semiconductor and growth-stock valuations.

macro_watch.name: fed-rates-risk
queries: Federal Reserve Powell CPI inflation rate cut rate hike markets when:7d
US inflation payrolls treasury yields stocks when:7d
macro_watch.summary_cn: 利率和通胀预期变化会直接影响成长股估值。
macro_watch.summary_en: Changes in rate and inflation expectations directly affect growth-stock valuations.

assets.label: 英伟达 / NVIDIA
news_queries: site:nvidianews.nvidia.com NVIDIA launch OR keynote OR platform OR Blackwell when:30d
site:investor.nvidia.com NVIDIA earnings OR results OR conference call when:60d

assets.label: 礼来 / Eli Lilly
news_queries: site:investor.lilly.com Eli Lilly earnings OR approval OR trial OR conference when:30d

manual_events.title: Lilly Q1 2026 earnings call
manual_events.title_cn: 礼来 2026 年一季度财报电话会
manual_events.impact_cn: 财报和管理层指引会明显影响礼来的短中期波动；如果减重药销售、产能和后续指引超预期，通常偏利好，反之偏风险。
manual_events.impact_en: The earnings call and management guidance can materially move Lilly. Strong obesity-drug sales, capacity commentary, and upbeat guidance are bullish; weaker commentary is a risk.

assets.label: 台积电 / TSMC
news_queries: site:pr.tsmc.com TSMC revenue OR earnings OR investor when:30d

manual_events.title: TSMC 1Q 2026 earnings conference
manual_events.title_cn: 台积电 2026 年一季度法说会
manual_events.impact_cn: 台积电财报和指引会直接影响全球 AI 半导体链预期；若先进制程、CoWoS、产能利用率和资本开支口径偏强，通常利好。
manual_events.impact_en: TSMC results and guidance directly shape expectations for the global AI semiconductor chain. Strong commentary on advanced nodes, CoWoS, utilization, and capex is usually bullish.
